brand-story-img-1.query: Designed for the Modern Woman Velmora was born from a belief that fine jewelry should not be reserved for special occasions alone. Every piece in our collection is designed in our New York studio and crafted with care using 18K gold plating and responsibly sourced materials. We create jewelry that feels precious yet accessible — pieces you reach for every single day.
